use_cases: Landing page hero section for SaaS and tech product marketing
Premium marketing pages with call-to-action buttons
Product showcase sections with gradient backgrounds
Startup landing pages with modern aesthetic
Conversion-focused hero sections with premium styling
ai_summary: A premium hero component designed for landing pages featuring modern gradient and glass-morphism visual styling. Built with Radix UI primitives and CVA for the included button variants. Supports desktop and mobile platforms with hover glow and scroll animation interactions. Best suited for SaaS products, e-commerce sites, and creator-focused platforms looking for a polished, high-converting hero section.
